mapper.select: SELECT id, ticket_id, approval_id, step_order, step_name, approver_id, step_status, decision_comment, decided_at, created_at, updated_at FROM ticket_approval_step WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY step_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, ticket_id, approval_id, step_order, step_name, approver_id, step_status, decision_comment, decided_at, created_at, updated_at FROM ticket_approval_step WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND step_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY step_order ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, ticket_id, approval_id, step_order, step_name, approver_id, step_status, decision_comment, decided_at, created_at, updated_at FROM ticket_approval_step WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND step_status = 'WAITING' AND step_order > #{currentStepOrder} ORDER BY step_order ASC LIMIT 1
